title: onobrychis viciifolia var. collina
intro: Onobrychis viciifolia var. collina, also known as sainfoin, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. Sainfoin is a type of plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with its leaves, flowers, and roots possessing medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's isoflavones and coumarins have been found to have health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving bone density, and reducing inflammation. Sainfoin can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
